text: As I promised, products of the great state of California, starting with chocolate, almonds, walnuts, pistachios, and wine. And congratulations. Thank you. And actually, since since we're at it, Canadians are gracious in defeat and even more gracious in victory. I put together a little bit of Raptors swag. I don't expect you to wear it, but the We the North and Toronto stuff. And I also wanted to include Peace by Chocolate, is a company in Antigonish, Nova Scotia, that was started by a family of Syrian refugees.
